mapper.select:
SELECT id, device_name, tag_number, installation_location_and_purpose, device_name_suffix, index_number, specification_model, manufacturer, measurement_range, Insertion_depth, connection_method_and_specifications, `precision`, casing_specifications_and_material, interlocked, interlock_set_value, remark, status, dv_type, factory FROM dv_temperature_gauge
and tag_number like CONCAT( #{tagNumber}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and device_name like CONCAT ('%',#{dvName}, '%')

SELECT device_name, tag_number, installation_location_and_purpose, device_name_suffix, index_number, specification_model, manufacturer, measurement_range, Insertion_depth, connection_method_and_specifications, `precision`, casing_specifications_and_material, interlocked, interlock_set_value, remark, status, dv_type, factory FROM dv_temperature_gauge
and tag_number like CONCAT( #{tagNumber}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and device_name like CONCAT ('%',#{dvName}, '%')
